title: Flexible Nourishment
subtitle: Adapting to your body's changing needs
description: At this stage, sensitivity to food and smells may be at its peak, and appetite can vary throughout the day. Being flexible with your food choices and eating what feels comfortable can help you stay nourished without added stress.
what_to_expect: Increased sensitivity to smells or certain foods
Need for flexibility in eating patterns
nutrition_focus: Eat based on comfort rather than strict schedules
Choose foods that feel easy to tolerate
Maintain hydration even if appetite is low
recommended_foods: Light meals like khichdi, dal-rice, or soft roti with sabzi
Fruits like banana, apple, or sweet lime
Simple snacks like toast, crackers, or biscuits
Curd, buttermilk, lentils, or eggs (if preferred)
hydration: Take small sips of water frequently
Include coconut water, lemon water, or light soups
reassurance: Listening to your body and staying flexible is enough to support your nourishment right now.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining flexibility while keeping meals regular can support stable energy levels.
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils and paneer
diabetes.reassurance: Balanced and frequent meals help maintain stability.

anemia.personalized_description: Even with fluctuating appetite, small amounts of iron-rich foods remain helpful.
nutrition_focus: Include iron-rich foods in small portions
Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Small, consistent intake supports your energy gradually.

hypertension.personalized_description: Light and simple meals can help maintain comfort and support stable blood pressure.
nutrition_focus: Maintain regular intake even if portions are small
hypertension.reassurance: Simple meals help maintain balance and comfort.

thyroid.personalized_description: Maintaining some consistency, even with flexibility, supports overall balance.
nutrition_focus: Eat at regular intervals when possible
thyroid.reassurance: Flexibility with consistency supports your body's needs.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, staying flexible while maintaining small, regular meals can help support balance.
priority_nutrition: Choose foods that feel easy to tolerate
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Gentle and flexible nourishment supports your well-being during this phase.
